findings.description: emptyPluginExtensions constant is placed between export statements in the middle of the file; move it adjacent to its usage functions for clarity.
The `as T[]` cast erases the concrete extension type at runtime. Document in JSDoc that callers are responsible for type consistency at the call site.
Upsert-by-id semantics in addPluginExtension allow idempotent re-registration and are tested explicitly.
usePluginExtensions correctly uses useMemo([extensions]); stable emptyPluginExtensions fallback prevents spurious re-memos.
Guard clauses on both extensionPoint and value.id prevent silent failures.
